{
  EmployeeColumnAttributes.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeColumnAttributesRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Id", new(Heading: "Employee ID", Order: 1));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Name", new(Width: 20));
    }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> IdColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Id, configuration);

    public static void IdHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::Employee, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Func<global::Employee, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Id);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> NameColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);
}

}
